navbar.confirmLogoutMsg: Are you sure you want to log out?

websiteSettings.title: Site Vitrine — Configuration
websiteSettings.subtitle: Configure your school's public website — logo, colours, content & more

logo.title: School Logo
logo.desc: Upload your school logo. PNG, JPG or SVG — max 2MB.

color.title: Primary Colour
color.desc: This colour will be used for buttons, links, and accents across your website.

tagline.title: Tagline / Slogan
tagline.desc: A short phrase that captures your school's spirit.
tagline.placeholder: Shaping the leaders of tomorrow, today.

description.title: School Description
description.desc: Tell families what makes your school special.
description.placeholder: Welcome to our school — a place where every child thrives...

hero.title: Cover Image (Hero)
hero.desc: The main banner of your campus website. Recommended 1920×800px — max 5MB.

template.title: Website Template
template.desc: Choose how your campus website looks. You can change this anytime.

stats.title: School Statistics
stats.desc: Display key numbers on your website to impress visitors.

values.title: School Values
values.desc: Add the core values that define your school's mission.
values.empty: No values added yet. Type one above and click Add.

publish.title: Publish Website
publish.desc: Make your campus website visible to the public.
